issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and pre-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were being enrolled in duplicate task sequences across multiple workflows, causing HAs and TCs to receive the same tasks twice. The root cause was identified as a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. Madelaine worked with HubSpot support to resolve the filter issue.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually dismiss the duplicate tasks; no re-enrollment should be needed.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were continuing to receive post-referral workflow check-in tasks even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow lacked proper suppression filters for these deal stages. Madelaine made a tweak to the workflow filters to prevent task generation for deals in terminal statuses.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any lingering check-in tasks for deals that were marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change on a deal
issues.desc: After a loan officer change on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the old LO rather than the newly assigned one. The issue was identified as a product-level data sync problem rather than a workflow configuration error. Luis resolved the issue on the affected deal.
issues.workaround: For deals where an LO change occurred during the impact window, manually verify that outgoing emails reference the correct LO and resend if necessary.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering TC tasks when deal stage flipped back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, then reverted to a prior stage, and then set back to Offer Accepted again, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger on the second Offer Accepted update. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. Madelaine updated the workflow to include it as a re-enrollment trigger.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that went through a second Offer Accepted transition between mid-March and the fix date to ensure TCs receive their tasks.

issues.title: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals being updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering TC workflow enrollment, meaning TCs were not receiving their tasks for these deals. The issue was investigated with HubSpot support and a fix was confirmed applied. MRC deals typically have no loan officer assigned, which was initially suspected as a factor but was not confirmed as the root cause.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted between the impact window dates into the TC workflow to ensure all closing tasks are completed.
